sections.paragraph:
ἀγάπη, ης, ἡ [ἀγαπάω]

—1. ‘a relatively high level of interest in the well-being of another’, affection, esteem, love, of God’s self as definition of ἀ., i.e. think of God and you think of ἀ. 1 J 4:8, 16; of God in outreach to people through the Son Ro 5:8; God and Christ in reciprocity to one another J 15:10; 17:26; of pers.: to God 5:42; to another human 2 Cor 8:7; as a superior quality Ro 13:10; 1 Cor 8:1; 13:1-3.

—2. ‘a feast at which common interests are shared’, love feast of a Christian group Jd 12; 2 Pt 2:13 v.l.
